sentences.blanked: Recent research provides new data about the ________ of this species.

sentences.en: They decided to focus on this index for sustainable development.
sentences.tr: Sürdürülebilir kalkınma için bu dizin, endeks üzerine odaklanmaya karar verdiler.
sentences.blanked: They decided to focus on this ________ for sustainable development.

sentences.en: Understanding the role of index is very important in modern biology.
sentences.tr: Modern biyolojide dizin, endeks rolünü anlamak çok önemlidir.
sentences.blanked: Understanding the role of ________ is very important in modern biology.
